title: Illegal Craftings [Fabric]
description:
A mod that allows you to create things you normally can't!
(Now Avabile for Fabric)
body:
# Illegal Craftings
Illegal Craftings is a mod that **allows you to craft things you can't normally craft!**

[![avalible for forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/illegal-craftings)

## Requied Mods
- **[Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/versions)**
## Recipes
For the Recipes, **you need to look them up in the Just Enough Items menu.**
Here is all the items that can be crafted with this mod to look up on Just Enough Items menu!

<details>
<summary>See the items/blocks...</summary>


- Bedrock
- Barrier
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Player Head
- Dragon Head
- Zombie Head
- Wither Head
- Skeleton Head
- Oak Leaves
- Grass Path
- Name Tag
- Netherrack
- Mycelium
- Creeper Head
- C418 Music Disc 13
- C418 Music Disc Strad
- C418 Music Disc Cat
- C418 Music Disc Blocks
- C418 Music Disc Mellohi
- C418 Music Disc Stal
- C418 Music Disc Far
- C418 Music Disc Chirp
- C418 Music Disc Warp
- C418 Music Disc Blocks
- C418 Music Disc Mall
- Chainmail Helmet
- Chainmail Chestplate
- Chainmail Leggings
- Chainmail Boots
- Ender Pearl
- Dead Bush (Smelting)
- Obsidian
- Grass Block

</details>
